message:
feat(dolt): default to loglevel=debug for query diagnostics

Per Tim Sehn recommendation, debug logging writes all queries and
responses to the log, enabling diagnosis of hangs from the last 1000
lines. Override with GT_DOLT_LOGLEVEL if needed.

Closes: gt-p761k

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
